# iosxe_interface_stackwise_virtual (Resource)

This resource can manage the Interface Stackwise Virtual configuration.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "iosxe_interface_stackwise_virtual" "example" {
  type                  = "TenGigabitEthernet"
  name                  = "1/0/1"
  link                  = 1
  dual_active_detection = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String) Interface type
  - Choices: `GigabitEthernet`, `TwoGigabitEthernet`, `FiveGigabitEthernet`, `TenGigabitEthernet`, `TwentyFiveGigE`, `FortyGigabitEthernet`, `FiftyGigabitEthernet`, `HundredGigE`, `TwoHundredGigE`, `FourHundredGigE`

### Optional

- `delete_mode` (String) Configure behavior when deleting/destroying the resource. Either delete the entire object (YANG container) being managed, or only delete the individual resource attributes configured explicitly and leave everything else as-is. Default value is `all`.
  - Choices: `all`, `attributes`
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `dual_active_detection` (Boolean)
- `link` (Number) - Range: `1`-`2`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The path of the object.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import iosxe_interface_stackwise_virtual.example "<type>,<name>"
```
